## Outcome

What should this task prove?

## Scope

- [ ] Architecture narrative
- [ ] Diagram
- [ ] Decision matrix
- [ ] Operational considerations
- [ ] Security considerations
- [ ] Cost considerations

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Clear enough for an architecture reviewer to understand in 5 minutes
- [ ] Senior architecture tone
- [ ] No fake implementation claims
- [ ] Tradeoffs documented
- [ ] Links to relevant official docs where needed
